rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS ERAZO VS. SANTOS, ANDREA A/K/A ANDREA GUEVARA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2014, Line 11.DEFENDANT SANTOS, ANDREA A/K/A ANDREA GUEVARA DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. Notice sufficiently apprises defendant "of the grounds under which possession is sought" per SFRO 37.9(c). Defendant does not cite any authority for the proposition that specific provision of the SFRO must be referenced in the notice or that it has to be repeated verbatim. Also no authority is cited for the proposition that SFRO 37.9(a)(7) is not applicable to the facts of this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHUO HUI HUANG VS. LINDA WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 25, 2014, Line 12.DEFENDANT LINDA WILSON Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Second Amended Complaint. GRANTED with leave to amend to attach a complete copy of HUD contract. Motion is otherwise denied. Notice apprises defendant of her "right" to relocation payments on Page 4 as required. Plaintiff's additional comments regarding actual payment does not invalidate the notice for the purpose of unlawful detainer proceeding. Plaintiff complied with CCP 1166 requirements regarding HUD Tenancy Addendum. See Declaration of Huang 2. Moving party and her counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C (courtesy copies) in future. = (501/REQ)
